title: ZundaMod
description: 🔊 Minecraft Narrator replacement with VoiceVox (ずんだもん) Mod
body: # ZundaMod © 坂本アヒル A replacement of narration mod for Minecraft with Fabric launcher. ## Usage run [VoiceVox.app](https://voicevox.hiroshiba.jp/) before Minecraft starting make sure `Opening/Options.../Accessibility Settings.../Narrator:` is NOT `OFF`! on mac for better Japanese input ... [CocoaInput](https://github.com/nakanotti/CocoaInput) ## How This Works https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9G8a60RzCD0 ## TODO * configuration * voice * volume * speed ## Warning * ~~VoiceVox version must be lower equal 0.13.4~~ fixed ~~use [1.0.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/zundamod/version/1.0.1-1.20.2-release)~~ * VoiceVox may accept Japanese only? * this mod is tested only on mac, and not tested well * this mod is experimental. don't ask me anything
